      "condition": "A method is processed completely and without error by the TPer",
      "example_trajectory": "Any well-formed Get/Set/Authenticate method with correct parameters and proper authorization returns SUCCESS",

    },

      "condition": "HostSigningAuthority has Operation=Password in Authority table, and HostChallenge does not match the required password",

      "expected_status": "NOT_AUTHORIZED (as SyncSession status)",
      "if_violated": "fail — authentication should have been rejected",
      "rule_ref": "RULE 03",
      "source_end_line": 30,
      "source_path": "docs/legacy_spec_rules.md",
      "source_span": "docs/legacy_spec_rules.md:24-30",
      "source_start_line": 24,
      "spec_section": "5.1.5.2",
      "title": "NOT_AUTHORIZED on wrong password in SyncSession"
    },
    {
      "category": "CATEGORY 1: STATUS CODE RULES (core/5.1.5.*)",
      "condition": "Attempt to open Read-Write session to SP when any other session to that SP is open, or Read-Only session when Read-Write is open",
      "example_trajectory": "Open RW session to LockingSP, then attempt another RW session to LockingSP without closing the first",
      "expected_status": "SP_BUSY (0x03) as SyncSession status",
      "if_violated": "fail — session concurrency violated",
      "rule_ref": "RULE 04",
      "source_end_line": 37,
      "source_path": "docs/legacy_spec_rules.md",
      "source_span": "docs/legacy_spec_rules.md:31-37",
      "source_start_line": 31,
      "spec_section": "5.1.5.3",
      "title": "SP_BUSY on concurrent session conflict"
    },
    {
      "category": "CATEGORY 1: STATUS CODE RULES (core/5.1.5.*)",
      "condition": "Host attempts to start session to SP in Issued-Frozen or Issued-Disabled-Frozen state",
      "example_trajectory": "StartSession to SP that is in Frozen lifecycle state",
      "expected_status": "SP_FROZEN (0x06) as SyncSession status",
      "if_violated": "fail — session should not be permitted",
      "rule_ref": "RULE 05",
      "source_end_line": 44,
      "source_path": "docs/legacy_spec_rules.md",
      "source_span": "docs/legacy_spec_rules.md:38-44",
      "source_start_line": 38,
      "spec_section": "5.1.5.6",
      "title": "SP_FROZEN when SP is in Frozen state"
    },
    {
      "category": "CATEGORY 1: STATUS CODE RULES (core/5.1.5.*)",
      "condition": "Attempt to open session when maximum concurrent sessions are all in use",
      "example_trajectory": "Open MaxSessions sessions, then attempt one more",
      "expected_status": "NO_SESSIONS_AVAILABLE (0x07)",
      "if_violated": "fail — TPer should reject the session",
      "rule_ref": "RULE 06",
      "source_end_line": 51,
      "source_path": "docs/legacy_spec_rules.md",
      "source_span": "docs/legacy_spec_rules.md:45-51",
      "source_start_line": 45,
      "spec_section": "5.1.5.7",
      "title": "NO_SESSIONS_AVAILABLE when max sessions reached"
    }
  ],
  "state_transition_consistency": [
    "Track session open/closed state, read-write vs read-only state, authentication state, lifecycle state, TryLimit/Tries state, and object/table state when relevant.",
    "Preceding records must make the final response logically reachable.",
    "Do not use an earlier error/success as the label target when records[-1].output is compliant.",
    "If a fail case is caused by an intermediate event, move the violating response to records[-1] instead of appending a later EndSession SUCCESS."
  ],

source_instruction_artifact.instruction: Judge whether the final Opal response is valid for the preceding command-response trajectory.

spec_rule_context.condition: A method is processed completely and without error by the TPer
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Any well-formed Get/Set/Authenticate method with correct parameters and proper authorization returns SUCCESS
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — if the TPer returns SUCCESS but the method was not processed correctly, the trajectory is non-compliant
spec_rule_context.title: SUCCESS on complete method processing

spec_rule_context.condition: No row in AccessControl table for the InvokingID/MethodID combination, or the ACL has not been satisfied
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: User attempts Set on a Locking range without authenticating an authority that satisfies the ACL
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — method should have been rejected
spec_rule_context.title: NOT_AUTHORIZED when no AccessControl row exists

spec_rule_context.condition: HostSigningAuthority has Operation=Password in Authority table, and HostChallenge does not match the required password
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: StartSession with HostSigningAuthority=SID and wrong HostChallenge value; SyncSession returns NOT_AUTHORIZED
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — authentication should have been rejected
spec_rule_context.title: NOT_AUTHORIZED on wrong password in SyncSession

spec_rule_context.condition: Attempt to open Read-Write session to SP when any other session to that SP is open, or Read-Only session when Read-Write is open
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Open RW session to LockingSP, then attempt another RW session to LockingSP without closing the first
spec_rule_context.title: SP_BUSY on concurrent session conflict

spec_rule_context.condition: Host attempts to start session to SP in Issued-Frozen or Issued-Disabled-Frozen state
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: StartSession to SP that is in Frozen lifecycle state
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — session should not be permitted
spec_rule_context.title: SP_FROZEN when SP is in Frozen state

spec_rule_context.condition: Attempt to open session when maximum concurrent sessions are all in use
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Open MaxSessions sessions, then attempt one more
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — TPer should reject the session
spec_rule_context.title: NO_SESSIONS_AVAILABLE when max sessions reached

source_instruction_artifact.instruction: Judge whether the final Opal response is valid for the preceding command-response trajectory.

spec_rule_context.condition: StartSession's HostSigningAuthority parameter is a class authority
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: StartSession with HostSigningAuthority = Admins (a class authority); SyncSession returns INVALID_PARAMETER
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — class authorities cannot be directly authenticated
spec_rule_context.title: INVALID_PARAMETER on class authority as HostSigningAuthority

spec_rule_context.condition: Method invocation has invalid parameters (wrong type, out of range, etc.)
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Set method with value larger than column type allows
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — TPer should reject malformed invocations
spec_rule_context.title: INVALID_PARAMETER on bad parameter values

spec_rule_context.condition: C_PIN object's Tries equals TryLimit (and TryLimit != 0), or Uses reached Limit
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Authenticate with authority whose C_PIN Tries == TryLimit
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — locked-out authority should not succeed
spec_rule_context.title: AUTHORITY_LOCKED_OUT on exceeded TryLimit

spec_rule_context.condition: For a specific SP, only one Read-Write session SHALL be open at a time; RO and RW are mutually exclusive
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Two concurrent RW sessions to the same SP
spec_rule_context.title: Only one Read-Write session per SP at a time

spec_rule_context.condition: Explicit changes made during Read-Only session SHALL NOT be made permanent (exceptions: PIN blocking, log updates)
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: Open RO session to LockingSP, attempt Set on Locking table column
spec_rule_context.expected_status: Method succeeds but changes are not persistent; or NOT_AUTHORIZED for Set
spec_rule_context.if_violated: fail — if Set method permanently modifies data in a RO session
spec_rule_context.title: Read-Only sessions SHALL NOT make permanent changes

spec_rule_context.condition: Write parameter SHALL be True for Read-Write session, False for Read-Only
spec_rule_context.example_trajectory: StartSession with Write=False, then attempt Set method (should fail or changes not persist)
spec_rule_context.title: Write parameter TRUE for Read-Write session
